title: Dense Mediterranean Garlic Pilaf
description: A smoky, pillowy low‑carb pilaf that brings back nostalgic Mediterranean flavors with a whole garlic bulb and fragrant spices.

ingredients.name: whole garlic bulb
ingredients.notes: cloves separated and lightly crushed, skin on

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a cazuela over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the crushed garlic cloves and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute, being careful not to brown.
Stir in the cauliflower rice, smoked paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper, cooking for 2 minutes to coat the grains.
Pour in the chicken broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the cazuela from heat and let it sit, covered, for 5 minutes to allow the grains to absorb moisture.
Fluff the pilaf gently with a fork, discard the garlic skins, and stir in the lemon zest.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more salt or pepper.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve hot as a comforting Mediterranean lunch.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
